The '''''Invincible''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]].

==History==
During the reborn [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Operation Shadow Hand|return]], ''Invincible'' was commanded by [[Zasm Katth]]. On [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], while giving chase to the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], the Star Destroyer met its final fate when it was impaled by the Air traffic control structure dismantled by its own tractor beam.

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Empire II 2|''Dark Empire II'' 2]] {{1st}}
